art.title: Articles
art.intro: Notes, write-ups from personal experience, and breakdowns of what I have built - infrastructure, DevOps, development, and whatever else seems worth recording. Partly subjective.

why_this_blog.title: Why all this
why_this_blog.excerpt: First post: who I am, what goes here, and why. No claim to be the final word.
why_this_blog.desc: First post: who I am, what goes here, and why. Notes, personal experience, and breakdowns of what I built - no claim to be the final word.

se.b1: Migrated 100+ VK Ads microservices to Consul service mesh, improving service discovery, observability, and inter-service communication reliability
se.b2: Designed and maintained metrics collection service with TeamCity REST API integration, enabling automated data import and analytics; implemented modular architecture supporting multiple data sources
se.b3: Enhanced developer experience through modernization of release and test pipelines, implementing GitOps principles for cloud deployments

sdet.role: Junior Software Development Engineer in Test
sdet.b1: Engineered thread-level test isolation and multi-machine parallel execution framework, achieving 50% reduction in test failure rates
sdet.b2: Led migration of multiple critical CI/CD pipelines from Jenkins to GitLab CI/CD, modernized legacy Jenkins jobs to declarative Pipelines
sdet.b3: Optimized CI/CD pipelines by implementing stage separation (build & test), enabling parallel execution and reducing resource contention

intern.role: Intern, Software Development Engineer in Test
intern.b1: Optimized test execution workflows through parallelization, achieving 30% reduction in overall test runtime
intern.b2: Implemented Redash dashboard with ClickHouse backend for real-time test statistics and quality metrics
intern.b3: Developed robust Python integration tests for complex microservices ecosystem involving Kafka, MySQL, ClickHouse, and Milvus
intern.b4: Reduced Docker build times by 40% through migration from pip to uv for dependency resolution and multi-stage builds

edu.school: RTU MIREA - Institution of Information Technology

resume.soft_note: Coordinated with 50+ developers during infrastructure changes
